creator: viktor.stujber+freebsd-bugs_v4CCPfay@gmail.com
text:
A freebsd user with an identical issue pointed me at
http://download.intel.com/embedded/processors/prodbrief/323288.pdf which
lists various atom processors and their "C-states supported". Turns out
D525 has no C-state power management, so what we encountered was not a
bug, but an intentional (but not advertised) hardware 'feature'.
